title: B-Tree vs. LSM-Tree (Log-Structured Merge-Tree)
description: Analyze the fundamental differences in data structure and operation between B-Trees and LSM-Trees. Evaluate the trade-offs between read amplification and write amplification for B-Tree and LSM-Tree based on specific workload profiles.
objectives: Analyze the fundamental differences in data structure and operation between B-Trees and LSM-Trees.
Evaluate the trade-offs between read amplification and write amplification for B-Tree and LSM-Tree based on specific workload profiles.
